summary.intent: Update the MCP documentation to add streamable-http transport as a supported option alongside stdio and SSE transports.
summary.outcome: Successfully updated docs/src/mcp.md and docs/src/configuration.md to include streamable-http examples and descriptions, then committed and pushed the changes.

repo: The project (volfco/streamable-http) is a worktree under /Users/penso/.superset/worktrees/moltis/, suggesting active multi-branch development.
MCP documentation lives in docs/src/mcp.md and docs/src/configuration.md.
The project supports multiple MCP transports: stdio, SSE, and streamable-http.

code.finding: Quick-start config block around line 49 was the insertion point for the streamable-http transport example.

workflow: Multiple reads of the same file were needed to locate the correct insertion points before editing, suggesting the file required careful navigation.
Docs changes were batched into a single commit and pushed together.

friction: mcp.md required 4 separate reads before edits could begin, indicating difficulty locating the right context or line numbers for each edit.
Multiple discrete edits to mcp.md (at least 4 Edit calls) suggest the doc had several scattered locations needing updates rather than one contiguous block.
